<td><h1>Documentation pull request</h1></td>
</tr></table>

Use this template for **documentation-only** changes (readme, comments in templates, org profile copy). For code or workflow behavior, use the **default** pull request template.

## Summary

- **What changed:** …
- **Why:** …
- **Refs:** … *(issue: `Closes #…` / `Refs #…`, or `none`)*

## Checklist

- [ ] Links and file paths resolve correctly *(including relative links if any)*
- [ ] Tone matches surrounding docs; no sensitive or internal-only data
- [ ] **Title** uses `docs(scope): …` when the repo follows conventional commits
